body:
Alex,

I noticed that public signals for Vercel’s funding and hiring are limited, and your company homepage is not publicly accessible. This can sometimes make scaling engineering capacity a challenge. We typically support companies like yours by providing dedicated Python and data engineering squads that integrate smoothly with your existing teams. While detailed staffing plans are best handled by a Tenacious delivery lead once we connect live bench data, I’d appreciate the chance to discuss how we might fit your needs.

Would you be open to a 30-minute discovery call next week to explore this further?

Best,  
[Your Name]  
Research Partner, Tenacious  
gettenacious.com
subject: Exploring Python and data engineering support for Vercel
